news.t: ETF leader board dominated by nimble funds
Newsprint Expands AI-Powered News Curation Capabilities with Acquisition of French-Based Daily Nugt

holdings.infoBox: NUGT is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings. The top holdings are VanEck Gold Miners ETF stock at 50.74%, Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins at 25.97%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 20.80%, Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 13.46%, and Cash at 4.48%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Gold Miners Index Bull 2X ETF (NUGT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MarketVector Global Gold Miners index. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure to a modified market capitalization-weighted index of global gold and silver mining firms. NUGT was launched on Dec 8, 2010 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: ETF leader board dominated by nimble funds
data.text: The top annual ETF performers share a common trait, the firm behind them and investors who are ready to trade no matter which direction the market goes.

data.title: Newsprint Expands AI-Powered News Curation Capabilities with Acquisition of French-Based Daily Nugt
data.text: PHILADELPHIA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Newsprint, an AI-powered media monitoring and news aggregation startup, today announced the acquisition of Daily Nugt.
